_comment: NEXUS Live Pipeline Schedule — per-pipeline overrides and metadata.

intelligence.description: Fetches market intelligence, detects patterns, scores sentiment.

financial.description: Analyses portfolio, backtests strategies, monitors risk limits.

evolution.description: Scans codebase for improvements; applies patches in dry_run (no writes).

consensus.description: Multi-IA consensus on strategic decisions; escalates contradictions.

reporting.description: Generates structured reports and exports them to reports/live/.

schedule_notes.intelligence: Every 1 hour — primary data ingestion loop.
schedule_notes.financial: Every 30 minutes — high-frequency risk & portfolio checks.
schedule_notes.evolution: Once per day — safe dry_run code analysis only.
schedule_notes.consensus: Every 2 hours — multi-IA strategic alignment check.
schedule_notes.reporting: Every 1 hour — audit-safe report generation and export.
